entry.title: Re: Can I extend a certain app? With Clean Core? How?
entry.content:
Hi @mlauber - thanks for the article. I'm new to S/4, coming from decades of experience in Oracle eBusiness Suite so my view of on-stack extensions comes from a different angle I suppose.

When you mention "check if you cannot create your own custom development" is custom development what you explained in Part 3 Option 1? 

Thanks again

entry.title: Re: Link Asset to Project/WBS Element or Maintenance Order
entry.content: Hi Sumesh, Thank you for you answer. Unfortunately, this is not the final solution, as there are no AUC involved here, but normal, capitalised assets. The customer is not currently using any AUC at all. The system is also not a receiver of the settlement rule. The customer only needs a link between the asset and the order or WBS element so that he can see for which asset the costs have been assigned to the order. An account assignment to the CO object does not lead to an asset transaction. Regards, Rado

entry.title: How to do Asset as a material in S4hana Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have a requirement of maintaining asset as a material in cloud for the purpose of having info record for those items. Is there any way to maintain like..

please help us to achieve this requirement.

Thanks,

Vignesh

entry.title: X Bar, R & mR control Charts to be generated based on a custom logic
entry.content:
Dear SAP Enthusiasts,

I had a request from business for generation 6 Sigma control charts from SAP directly, which presently is being generated using Excel. Upon checking i saw we have an option for generating control charts using QGC3 transactions. Unfortunately, this is not meeting the business requirement, as the business logic is to compare the results of the last 60 inspection lots and then plot the control chart based on the output.

In addition, they are asking for the same functionality available in Excel, such as filtering of charts based on the filter condition system to regenerate the control charts. If someone can shed some light on this issue by providing FMs or any references, it would be highly appreciated.

Also please note that my business SAP version is EHP6 and in this if we have to generate these.

Regards,

Sanoob Thambi/9003050156

entry.title: Re: Cant set Scema from GET record
entry.content:
Dear Ben, 

The response that you show in the 2nd image is SINGLE object with the schema:

{
  results: [
    { object }
  ]
}

This is an object, but then in the 3rd image you set the path to the response as 'd.results', which in your case is a LIST. A LIST type is not a SINGLE record. Hence you cannot set the schema. 
There are two solutions for this:
1. you either omit the 'response key path' setting and then you'll get an object with the full schema that you have. 

2. You configure the exact same call but under the 'Get record collection' tab in the left side menu. In this scenario please also use the 'response key path' the same way as you have already done in image 3. 

Wishing you the best in developing your application.

entry.title: Sample Printout in Journal Entry
entry.content:
I have a user request to print out incoming and outgoing payments in journal entry.

Can in Journal Entry App Cloud, Public Edition add an additional toolbar or button to insert a print out such as Sample Printout like in create dunning notice app?

entry.title: Re: Can I extend a certain app? With Clean Core? How?
entry.content:
Hello @snavajan ,

Custom development means any development you create in your customer namespace. Basically meaning you create your objects (you can reuse standard but wrap them into your own, custom objects, such as CDS views). This can be directly on your S/4HANA system (yes, like Option 1) but it could also be applicable for certain cases to develop your requirement in the cloud side-by-side on SAP BTP. So with custom development I truly mean any kind of development that you create yourself, without modifying anything standard in SAP. Hope that clarifies what I mean 🙂

BR

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm delighted to have joined this community! One of the reasons I keep coming back is to learn from our featured contributors. Their insights always leave me feeling inspired and eager to learn more. I look forward to engaging in fruitful discussions with all of you.

entry.title: EWM pick pass pack and pass with pick by cart app possible?
entry.content:
Until now, picking has been done on paper, but now we want to go digital 😊

Currently, the «normal products» are first picked into a box using the multi-order picking principle. The box with the picking slip is then placed on a conveyor belt and transported to a second area. In the second area the "special products" are picked (not by the same person). In this area, however, it is not multi-order picking but picking per box (or picking slip). The box is then returned to the conveyor belt and transported to the packing station. The entire process is not supported by a system but is simply handled using the picking slip.

Our idea is to create an activity area for the "normal products" and one for the "special products" so that the tasks are split into different warehouse orders. And then using the pick pass pack functionality! But the warehouse orders for the "normal products" should then be picked using the “Pick by Cart app” and after picking the “normal products” placed on the conveyor belt. The "special products" should then be picked by RF Transaction and per HU.

 

Is this feasible with EWM? Has anyone already done this? If so, what do I need to consider?

entry.title: Re: Batch derivation during GR
entry.content: Hi Arjuna, the setting has already been maintained. Could you please tell me what else I should look at?

entry.title: How to customize statutory reports for India
entry.content:
Hi experts,

We have to generate GST reports such as Sales,Purchase register and ITC 04 from SAP cloud system.

We know that GSTR1, GSTR3B and GSTR6 will come as standard in s4hana cloud (Only GSTR1 able to generate from system).

Is there any way to customize these reports (Sales,Purchase,ITC 04) in SAP by using Define statutory reports App. I would like to know How other clients having reports like these. Does anyone encounter this situation before? If so, any solution for it?. Is there any way to customize it and how to configure GSTR3B and GSTR6?

Thanks,

Vignesh

entry.title: Re: Sap B1 Hana SP 2402 Registering B1WebServer into SLD...
entry.content: I'm grateful for your help. But the problem persists for me. I did what you said, I even did a clean installation on a brand new virtual machine, but the problem persists.

entry.title: Re: Creating Test Users for Fit to Standard WS (email fie...
entry.content: This is one option. The other option is that you append per test your email address with "+", e.g. john.doe+projectmanager@example.com, john.doe@purchaser@example.com. The email notifications triggered from the system will then end up in the given users inbox and you can also test email notification scenarios in this setup.

entry.title: How can we filter only authorized catalog items in Create Purchase Requisition App?
entry.content:
I use Fiori app manage catalog item to crated catalog for requester.

We need to divide catalog to many groups, ex. Maintenance catalog, House keeping catalog. And user shouldn't select catalog across group.

Can we protect User ID from house keeping group to select item from maintenance catalog?

Where can I assign catalog for each user ID or filter this by authorization?

entry.title: SAP Service and Asset Manager 2210 - Goods Issue - UOM Issue
entry.content:
Hello Experts

We are in the process of enabling the Inventory Clerk persona in the SSAM 2210 application. As part of that, we are facing an issue when we post the Goods Receipt/Good Issue against PO/Reservation from the mobile application.

'Unit ST is not created in language EN' - If post from device where we have language set as Danish.

'Unit PC is not created in language DA'- If post from device where we have language set as English

Can you please help us on this?

entry.title: Re: How to unhide header in UI setting within Workflow mo...
entry.content:
You can try to turn it off by accessing the UI settings page directly.

To do this:

  • Log into Advanced Workflow as an admin user
  • Application will open, showing the Home Page (URL will be {environment}/wpm/userHome.do?&tenantName={yourDomain} , for example /https://sandbox.webcomserver.com/wpm/userHome.do?&tenantName=test_tenant_123)
  • Now modify the URL to open UI settings page ( URL is {environment}/wpm/sp/setings/ui , for example  https://sandbox.webcomserver.com/wpm/sp/settings/ui 
  • Change the Hide Header settings and turn it off

Best regards

  Lana

entry.title: Re: Configure SAP-SIC - For Vertex
entry.content:
Hi Aman S,

Apology for the late response.

You can user FM "RFC_DETERMINE_JURISDICTION" to check the Jurisdiction Code is getting generated using RFC created for Vertex. And you can also take a help from ABAP team to develop a small program to use this FM and RFC if code is generated the the value for parameter "LOCATION_ERR" will be 0000. any value other than 0000 will be treated as a failed connection.

I hope this is informative.

Thanks/Medha Nand Jha

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Service and integration with SAP Field Service Management
entry.content: @wnash7658 Thank you for your kind words.

entry.title: Re: Configure SAP-SIC - For Vertex
entry.content:
Hi sreekanthreddy_bommu,

Apology for the late response.

I do not thinking this can be configured in SIC to separate or filter out the code and send to SAP. SIC is only responsible to exchange the request and response.

I hope this is informative.

Thanks/Medha Nand Jha

entry.title: Re: Bring your own Git for SAP BTP ABAP Environment
entry.content:
Hello @christoph_pohl,

are there any further configuration steps for the ABAP envrionment to do? When I try to log-in into the GitHub account (Clone software component), I get a handshake error (message from browser console):

Request failed with status code 400: GET fetch_branches?sap-client=100&sc_name='###'&git_user='###'&git_token='###'&repo_url='https%3A%2F%2Fgithub.com%2F###.git' - [{"code":"A4C_A2G/000","message":"SSL handshake with github.com:443 failed: SSSLERR_","persistent":true,"targets":["/SoftwareComponents"],"type":"Error"}] sap.ui.model.odata.ODataMessageParser

 

There is an active main branch for this repository.

Greetings 

Björn

entry.title: Re: PO/INVOICE PRICE DEVIATIONS
entry.content:
Hello,

You have to configure few things:

1. Setting invoice tolerance limit to your company code to check deviation from PO and Invoice. Usually using PP tolerance limit type. In here, you can set by percentage or by fixed amount.

2. Setting message from warning to error, if the amount is more or less than invoice tolerance limit (step 1)

entry.title: Re: SIGNAVIO-Process Manager: Process Chain automatic cre...
entry.content:
Hello Tiago Cassiano,

Thank you for reaching out. Currently, Signavio does not offer a built-in conversion tool for generating Value Chain diagrams from BPMN diagrams automatically. The linkage process between BPMN diagrams and Value Chains is a manual task.

For guidance on creating these linkages, you can refer to our documentation on Value Chains: Signavio Value Chains Documentation.

Please, we encourage you to submit a SAP for me ticket. This will allow us to document your inquiry and consider it for future development.

Thank you very much!

Julien

entry.title: Get total price of the product based on attribute selection
entry.content:
Hello Guys,

I have doubt on getting price of products which have the selected attribute.

For example consider product is 'abc'  and it has attribute called type(values: small,medium,large). Suppose I add three 'abc' products. The first product is having attribute type as small. Second have medium and third product have large as attribute value.

Now I need to print the total price of 'abc' product which is having attribute type value as medium and large. Small attribute value in the product should be ignored. Also I need to sum up if there are extra products with medium. Then I need to add those two product total and assign it in a cell of the word template.

Please help me with this issue

entry.title: Re: PO/INVOICE PRICE DEVIATIONS
entry.content: Okay, So Can I do it for some materials? Because We have two types of materials, and one can post with deviations, and second one can't post with deviations

    "Product": "123",
    "ProductCategory": "TELE",
    "ProductType": "LCD"
  }
}

entry.title: Re: Table partitoning CDPOS - having more than 2 billion record
entry.content: Hi Nilesh can you please share what query you extecuted..

entry.title: Re: How to extract the Deleted Comments in Goal Section f...
entry.content:
Hi @PriyankaDutta 

If user entered comments in previous review steps and removed the comments in current review step, user can still find previously entered comments in the Form Information > Audit Trail as below screenshot.
Clicking highlighted links will open the form content snapshot of relevant review step.

Regards,
Luka

entry.title: Re: SAP TM tables
entry.content:
Hi,

TM does not use table for all part the process is more Object oriented ABAP, use this guide to understand.

(PDF) SAP TM Enhancement Guide 2nd Edition.pdf - PDFSLIDE.NET

Regards

Rogerio

entry.title: Re: How to sell services (Time ) to customers with one...
entry.content: You can either dive into the world of resource-related billing (https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw70/7.0.12/ja-JP/f0/e2fd37c7bfc72ce10000009b38f842/content.htm?no_cache=true) or - if you want to have something very lean and mean, set up a material as a service without delivery (LEIS item category group) and use a price condition with either a scale which has fist 8 hours for free or add a condition base valueb routine which deducts 8 hours of the total amount of hours.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: That's great @Alisha786 that you get so much value in returning to SAP Community! We'd love to hear from you as well! If you don't want to write blog posts, you can feel free to take part in discussion in our discussion groups (discuss, connect, share). You might also be interested to "meet" some of our influencers.

- The import com.sap.tc.cmi cannot be resolved

I have an older project to get running again on NW 7.50, but I think the imported Jars are not correct or incomplete.

I use sapjvm8.

Many thanks

entry.title: Re: How to unhide header in UI setting within Workflow mo...
entry.content: Thanks, Lana, for the solution. This resolved the issue.

entry.title: Re: PO/INVOICE PRICE DEVIATIONS
entry.content:
Hello,

You can't have invoice check per item materials. This setting applicable on company code level. Or maybe you can set this also in vendor specific level, but for material I don't think so.

There is some workaround for this. If you want user can't change or don't have to change the price why you not use ers invoice, so after you gr the invoice can be triggered, without changing the price. This have to be set in PO item level.

entry.title: Direct link to source system in Signavio Process Insights
entry.content:
Hi community.

With the latest release 02/2024 it's supposed that in Signavio Process Insights there is a direct link for a list of document to the source system. This functionality is not present in our system so my questions are:

- is it requested to do something in the systems (ERP or Signavio) to enable this feature?

- for wich document type this feature is enabled?

Thank you in advance.

Best Regards.

Giuseppe

entry.title: Re: Reporting who has visibility of each performance form
entry.content:
Hi @IanBold 

System doesn't support to generate a report for form visibility. You can consider to submit an influence for this requirement so that it's properly tracked and gauged.

Regards,
Luka

entry.title: Re: CO88 and OKG8 Relationship?
entry.content: Hello Sumesh, thank you for your reply. For 1, do you mean checking for the account 500502 in OKG5? I checked for the RAKey, that is assigned for this production order, but I this account is not assigned in OKG5. In OKG8 this account was assigned to POCI/POCS, but I have replaced it with 500503. But where is the connection to CO88? RA Key is not part of OKG8. So I think, he checks the whole OKG8 accounts, whether he needs it or not finally?! Kind Regards, Olga

entry.title: Re: CO88 and OKG8 Relationship?

entry.title: Re: Sap Business One: Copy "Business Partner Project" to...
entry.content: My query is used for SQL version. If you use HANA version, you have to follow HANA syntax. If you don't query from a specific table, you must add "from dummy"

entry.title: Re: PO/INVOICE PRICE DEVIATIONS

entry.title: Breakdown maintenance implementation
entry.content:
Dear Team, 
Can anyone help on implementation of breakdown maintenance specific for pharma industry 

I can execute the below things 

- Create notification - Order against notification - order confirmation - TECO

To streamline our efforts and ensure a successful deployment, we are seeking your valuable support to obtain crucial information on below points:-

we are seeking your valuable support to obtain crucial information on below points:-

  • Process flow for pharma industries - What is the process flow designed by SAP standard for Pharma industries?
  • QA approval process – does the standard configuration include a QA approval process for the breakdown maintenance module
  • Mail Notification Functionality – is there built-in mail notification functionality in SAP Fiori, facilitating notifications at each stage of the process  
  • Fiori App accessibility – According to SAP standards, the FIORI app is limited to desktop usage for both raising notifications and executing processes

    Regards:-

    Brajendra Bhushan

entry.title: Maintenance Strategy Adobe Forms On-Premise
entry.content:
SAP's recommended solution for print forms and interactive forms is the Cloud solution SAP Forms service by Adobe, both for SAP S/4HANA on-premise and SAP S/4HANA Cloud (public and private edition).

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition already uses SAP Forms service by Adobe on SAP BTP. SAP Forms service by Adobe on SAP BTP is the standard option for customers using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition.

For customer deployments where a Cloud approach is not feasible SAP will continue to offer an on-premise deployment option.

As already announced, the SAP NetWeaver Application Server Java 7.5 will go out of Mainstream Maintenance at the end of 2027 and out of Extended Maintenance at the end of 2030. After 2030 there will be no further updates.

The maintenance strategy for SAP S/4HANA is documented here: https://support.sap.com/en/release-upgrade-maintenance/maintenance-information/maintenance-strategy/s4hana-business-suite7.html 

The maintenance strategy for SAP NetWeaver is documented here: https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/abap/netweaver-maintenance-strategy 

As announced at the DSAG Technology Days 2024 in Hamburg, SAP HANA Extended Application Services, Advanced Model (XSA) will be the successor platform for Adobe Document Services.
SAP plans to deliver this option during the support time frame of the S/4HANA 2025 release. Customers can then decide to switch from the ADS on NetWeaver AS Java to SAP Forms service by Adobe or the ADS on XSA. This guarantees long-term support of Adobe-based forms functionality for S/4 HANA on-premise solutions.

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) - empty rows in Table appea...
entry.content:
Hi Mirko, one possible reason that you have empty rows at the end of your table is that it was added manually (and accidently) during development. The UI is a bit tricky and one can easily do it without realizing it. So, if that's your case you would need to remove them manually clicking the minus ("-") button at bottom of the table. Cheers

Hint: by showing the grid, it is easier to identify any empty rows/columns.

entry.title: Re: eDocument: Italy E-Invoicing - Process Flow
entry.content:
Hi Randy, actually i found only the official H2G from SAP from here: https://api.sap.com/package/eDocumentElectronicInvoicingforItaly/documents 

Unfortunately even with these ones we were not fully able to complete the setup. Did you manage in the meantime to implement the package from SAP? Is there some tip on what to look out for, especially regarding the custom domain (cert authentication required for the whole maschine, change of the domain name for all iFlows, etc.)? Is this really necessary?

Kind regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi, I am Mathew from Austria, originally from India. Recently, I changed my career to SAP consulting and am starting with the MM module. Happy to join the community.

entry.title: Packaging material items created although TVTY-KZPGN initial
entry.content:
Dear community,

I am facing the following issue: We are generating packaging material items from handling units in outbound deliveries. For some packaging materials, we don't want to generate items. Hence, we are using packaging material types where we leave the field TVTY-KZPGN blank. As far as I understand the documentation for this field, no items should be generated if it is blank. However, the system still creates those items.

Any experience with this? Any solution proposals?

Thanks and best regards, Michael

entry.title: Re: March Developer Challenge - CloudEvents: Week 1
entry.content:
Here is my try to create a "Production order created" event.

{
  "type": "sap.s4.beh.productionorder.v1.ProductionOrder.Created.v1",
  "datacontenttype": "application/json",
  "specversion": "1.0",
  "source": "m32z",
  "subject": "Production Order 1000206 created",
  "id": "QgEK7wzuHtqdhJwqCS+VOA==",
  "time": "2024-02-08T12:00:00Z",
  "data": {
    "ProductionOrder": "1000206",
    "ProductionOrderType": "PP01",
    "ProductionPlant": "HD00"
  }
}

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 4
entry.content: Late submission but this week I have been busy playing with Flexible Programming Model 🙂

entry.title: Re: Adjust column width according to the data through CDS view
entry.content:
Hi Ian,

It seems there's no such cssDefaults:

I guess you were referring to CAP CDS which seems to have it with different syntax:

I couldn't find it in the ABAP CDS Documentation too (under lineItem or elsewhere): UI Annotations 

Conclusion is that it's not available via ABAP CDS UI annotation. Any expert can confirm this?

Those looking for a solution can have a look here for some other options suggested outside CDS: Setting the Default Column Width

entry.title: Re: CO88 and OKG8 Relationship?
entry.content:
Hello Olga, For 1 , I mean to say In OKG8 POCI/POCS must be tagged in combination with some RA cost element category 31, Check to which line id that cost element mapped in OKG4, now in OKG5 check cost element mapped to this line id (now is there any cost elelemt that is used in your production order or not).

It may also possible settlement check all items in OKG8 (Check if RA cost element maintained against POCI/POCS or not).

Regards,

Sumesh Gupta

entry.title: Re: Change Material in Sales Order Line Item Using BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE
entry.content:
• Are you allowed to change this field with VA02 (what is line item status, are there followng documents, etc.)
  • In recent versions there is a MATERIAL_LONG field for long material number
  • Search and read also OSS notes such as 3260628 - BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE does not set MATNR_CHANGED

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi @andreas_paul ,

Memory Calculator V1 is not supported by SJB 2 because V1 uses SAP JVM (which is based on Java 8).  SJB 2 does not carry SAP JVM but only SapMachine JRE 17.

Note: Even in SJB 1, Memory Calculator V1 is not the default one, and Memory Calculator v2 is the recommended one. See: Memory Calculator

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Recruiting: New Career Site Job Search and Job Layout
entry.content:
Hi all,

just a quick follow-up on radius search. SAP confirmed to us, that the standard feature "radius search" is currently not available when using Unified Data Model. Their proposed workaround is to check a possibility to have a custom code.

In the next release, they will introduce a new Google job map, so maybe this might include a new radius search functionality for unified data model.

entry.title: SAP Forms Service by Adobe with WebUI S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

We are implementing the Grantor Management solution from SAP on the S/4 system. This solution foresees in several user interfaces for the end-user:

  • Web User Interface (based on FIORI 3.0)
  • Fiori apps

The Fiori apps for Grantor are not official native Fiori apps but are more WCF kind of apps (WEBCUIF).

During the process of handling the Grantor transactions is creating output (correspondence) that is send to the customer. So for this, the user should be able to generate a document (brief/letter) that is retrieving data from the S/4 back end and pre-fill the document.

Once the document is created by the system, the user should be able to edit this document before sending it to the customer.For this process of creating and editing documents we would like to propose SAP Forms by Adobe since we were told this is the future-proof solution provided by SAP for this purpose.

The Grantor solution is not new, it was already released years ago on SAP CRM system. This SAP CRM system user interface was called the CRM WebClient.
In the past we had several discussions with SAP regarding the possibility to use SAP Forms by Adobe with the SAP CRM WebClient. It was then determined that this would not work due to old techniques in SAP CRM and it would only work with S/4HANA.

Now since Grantor is now running on S/4HANA we would like to know if it is now possible to use SAP Forms by Adobe with the Web User interface (based on FIORI 3.0) and/or the Fiori apps (WCF type of Fiori apps)?

Why we would like to position SAP Forms by Adobe in combination with Grantor is because of the capabilities of the SAP Forms solution:

  • Create interactive forms that look exactly like their paper counterparts.
  • Annotate PDF documents and collaborate on PDF document reviews.
  • Capture data using forms and import the data directly into the SAP system.
  • Allow users to digitally sign PDF documents.
  • Embed other file formats inside PDF documents as attachments.

So the question we have is, is it possible to use SAP Forms by Adobe in combination with the Web User Interface and/or Fiori apps for Grantor on S/4HANA?

Best regards,

Pieter Schepers

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Recruiting: New Career Site Job Search and Job Layout
entry.content:
@maseitner we are analysing to start the implementation and what we are still in doubt is how to update the open JR ( around nearly 300) with the new standard fields.

@LisaRaff I saw your comments about regarding this. Have you succeeded in doing a mass update via integration center?

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Recruiting: New Career Site Job Search and Job Layout
entry.content:
Hi @HangTRAN ,

no, unfortunately we did not succeed so far with an upload via integration centre. SAP support could not help us with this issue, either. If you find a solution for this we would be eager to hear about it!

Kind regards,

Lisa

entry.title: Re: PO/INVOICE PRICE DEVIATIONS
entry.content: You can set this in vendor master in accounting view. But you have to set the limit in this configuration.

entry.title: Re: Composite Widgets SAC - Responsive Story
entry.content:
Hi Daniel,

You will be able to add composite into story responsive page in QRC2/2024 Release.

 

thanks and best regards

Jie

entry.title: How to trigger sending orders to SCPI
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on SAP commerce cloud 2211 and composable storefront 6.x. I am creating orders from the frontend, they are saved in the commerce backend. I want my orders to be sent to SCPI, so I created all the outbound configurations e.g. consumed destinations, http distinations, channel, stream etc. But the sending is not triggered.

In the code I see the action SapCpiOmsOrderOutboundAction but it is not part of any business process. I mean when I search I can not find it in any XML definition.

Is the XML definition included in another extension?

I also read, i should install ysapcpiomsfulfillment, which I did. But it includes just strategy classes with code similar to the SapCpiOmsOrderOutboundAction and it is also not triggered.

So, the questions now are

1- How to trigger the sending?

2-What is the difference between SapCpiOmsOrderOutboundAction and the classes in ysapcpiomsfulfillment? why do they have similar code and when should each of them be used?

Here are the extensions, that I use

Hello,

I am working on SAP commerce cloud 2211 and composable storefront 6.x. I am creating orders from the frontend, they are saved in the commerce backend. I want my orders to be sent to SCPI, so I created all the outbound configurations e.g. consumed destinations, http distinations, channel, stream etc. But the sending is not triggered.

In the code I see the action SapCpiOmsOrderOutboundAction but it is not part of any business process. I mean when I search I can not find it in any XML definition.

Is the XML definition included in another extension?

I also read, i should install ysapcpiomsfulfillment, which I did. But it includes just strategy classes with code similar to the SapCpiOmsOrderOutboundAction and it is also not triggered.

So, the questions now are

1- How to trigger the sending?

2-What is the difference between SapCpiOmsOrderOutboundAction and the classes in ysapcpiomsfulfillment? why do they have similar code and when should each of them be used?

Here are the extensions, that I use

<extension name="magnithordermanagement"/> based on yacceleratorordermanagement
<extension name="magnithsapcpiomsfulfillment"/> based on ysapcpiomsfulfillment
<extension name="sapcpicustomerexchangeb2b"/>
<extension name="sapcpiorderexchangeb2b"/>

<extension name="ordermanagementwebservices"/>
<extension name="b2bordermanagementwebservices"/>
<extension name="sapcpiorderexchange"/>
<extension name="sapcpiadapter"/>

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: EWM pick pass pack and pass with pick by cart app pos...
entry.content:
Hi,

ok, this would need to be complete checked, by setting it up in order to see what limitations you might run into. And all I describe would be the standard, without modifications.

But in general you would use a pick, pack, & pass scenario for this. Also the "normal products" would come from an activity area which is part of the PPP scenario (otherwise the pick HU would not move to the second area for the next picking).

If you then use the pick by cart app for one of the picking parts, is a different question. The pick by cart app is a fancy version of the RF dialog, technically you use the RF framework. But of course the pick by cart app is meant to pick into several pick HUs at the same time. Which is possible in a PPP scenario as well, but usually gets messy. Why do you want to use the pick by cart app?

OK, probably because of this: " In this area, however, it is not multi-order picking but picking per box (or picking slip). " So in the first area you have a warehouse order which includes WTs for different deliveries, separated by different pick HUs, in the second area you now want to split the next WTs into different WOs.

Yeah, that is something which needs to be tested. The main controlling part for the pick by cart app is the resource type. And you need a WOCR which makes the combination of WTs, but keeps them in different pick HUs. That is just the WOCR. But if this works in a PPP scenario, you need to try (at least if no-one here says that they have done it already). The system must be able to create a higher level WO (which happens in a PPP scenario), but the lower level WOs do not all belong together.

Brgds

Juergen

---
All the above is no official SAP statement.

Want to learn EWM?
Check for EWM courses: https://training.sap.com/trainingpath/Applications-Extended+Warehouse+Management-EWM+in+S4HANA
Get a SAP Learning Hub Subscription: https://training.sap.com/learninghub

And it is EWM. NOT eWM - Duh!
And if your question includes the word "transfer order" - do NOT tag the question with Extended Warehouse Management!

entry.title: Way of functioning of SAP Jco Library
entry.content:
Dear SAP community,

We have implemented a JCo Server, which uses tRFC and the JCoFunction IDOC_INBOUND_ASYNCHRONOUS. The JCoServerFunctionHandler as well as the JCoServerTIDHandler have custom implementations for saving IDocs with CRUD operations into the database.

During internal tests we noticed, that for instance, if we would throw a RuntimeException (e.g. the database connection has been lost) in the commit() method of the JCoServerTIDHandler the transaction will not be reprocessed.

The same behavior could be observed, if we just throw a RuntimeException in the handleRequest(JCoServerContext jcoServerContext, JCoFunction jcoFunction) of the JCoServerFunctionHandler implementation. 

In both cases we receive an error in the log file, but SAP does not seem to send the IDoc again or check with checkTID(JCoServerContext serverContext, String transactionID) if the IDoc has been processed already.

So my lack of understanding results in three questions:

  • Is there no feedback with regards to the information in case the IDoc has been received?
  • Do you need to call a specific JCoFunction to signal SAP the IDoc has not been successfully received and needs to be sent again in a later try?
  • Is this in general not something I can do with the JCo Java Library and it needs to be configured on the SAP system to handle feedback sent back (e.g. through a RuntimeException) to the SAP system (I do not know, if there is a response from the SAP library in this case)

I would appreciate any valuable input with regards to this question as I am currently a bit stuck to cover all necessary edge cases to ensure data consistency.

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Is direct SAP HANA database connectivity permitted in RISE - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Our objective is to integrate SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition (RISE) with our Data Warehouse system, utilizing ODBC-based connectivity to establish a direct connection with the SAP HANA database.

We are keen to ascertain the feasibility of establishing direct ODBC connectivity to the SAP HANA database within the SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud RISE Edition. Your insights on this matter would be greatly valued as we proceed with our integration plans.

Kind regards, Vijay

entry.title: Re: How To Upload Data to a Public or Private Planning Version Using a File Upload Custom Widget Wi
entry.content:
Hi @ginot 

Unfortunately this is not possible.

Best regards

Gerd

entry.title: Re: User without global accounts associated in SAP BTP Cockpit - trial

entry.title: What’s New for SAP Build Apps – Mobile Authentication
entry.content:
Greetings Builders! This week we have released a significant feature for our customers: mobile authentication.

We have now enabled SAP Mobile Services, which authenticates end users in your native mobile applications and provides access to integrations and services from SAP Business Technology Platform. 

SAP Build Apps uses SAP Cloud Identity Services – Identity Authentication (IAS) for user authentication in the cloud. For more information on this topic, see the article: What is Identity Authentication?

Now with the ability to harness the power of Identity Authentication, you can increase the enterprise readiness of your company’s mobile apps by ensuring seamless integration with SAP Business Technology Platform. This feature allows you to reuse destinations of backend systems, which are also used for web applications and many other BTP services.

To get started with taking advantage of this feature, verify that you have Subaccount entitlements of at least 1 unit for Mobile Services (standard plan) as a prerequisite. 

After configuring mobile authentication in your BTP Cockpit and your build settings, you can build your first mobile app with authentication services enabled. Your users will be prompted with a first-time setup, after which they'll need to provide a single access code each time they log in.

👉For instructions on getting started with mobile authentication, see the documentation: SAP Build Apps – SAP Mobile Services.

We look forward to seeing our customers unlock more possibilities by enabling mobile authentication in their apps! Feel free to share any feedback or questions about this release in the comments.

Check out what else is on the horizon for SAP Build Apps this year in the Roadmap Explorer.

To see all recent SAP Build Apps releases, visit the What’s New Documentation.

entry.title: A day in the life of a Customer Success Partner – helping customers on their cloud journey
entry.content:
Before we start: Our main protagonist Torsten

Torsten is a 35-year-old engaged SAP Customer Success Partner (CSP) for a major automotive supplier. He is a dedicated and tech-savvy professional who acts as an intermediary between SAP and the customer. His main goal is to ensure the smooth implementation of the customer’s cloud solutions and their optimal operation. In doing so, he uses a variety of SAP tools and services and regularly agrees with the customer. His activities run under the SAP Preferred Success cloud service. I thought sharing Thorsten’s story is a good illustration how SAP Cloud Services look like in real life.

Figure: Illustration of different activities in SAP Preferred Success

Preparation with Onboarding and Cloud Mindset Workshop

The day starts with the activities around onboarding the customer. Torsten ensures that the customer has access to all relevant resources. The customer gets everything he & she need to be successful independently. In addition, after onboarding, the customer knows how to contact Torsten and how to tackle open topics together.

As part of the onboarding, the cornerstone for the collaboration between the Customer Success Partner and the customer is fixed. The first regular dates and synch-meetings are set.

The Cloud Mindset Workshop is the entry point to the world of SAP Preferred Success services. Together, the cultural and organizational change that forms the basis for the successful implementation and operation of SAP cloud solutions is reflected here. Mindset stands for values, beliefs, norms which influence our behaviors. Working with Cloud Software due to the different nature of cloud compared to on-premise software needs a change in mindset. For further reading see this whitepaper from SAPs Change Management team.

Learning Recommendations to develop SAP Knowledge

With SAP Preferred Success, the customer receives five licenses from the SAP Learning Hub, the comprehensive learning platform for SAP products and technologies. Torsten ensures that the customer uses these licenses optimally. He recommends appropriate learning content, learning paths, live-sessions, training systems and/or certifications. For SAP Preferred Success there is even an own learning portal with communities by Edition and learning content around the SAP Preferred Success Services.  

Support the implementation of SAP cloud solutions

In the implementation phase of a SAP Cloud solution, Torsten offers a number of services, including solution launch checks related to integration, extensibility, identity & access management, embedded analytics, UX exploration, or SAP Cloud ALM. He can select them from a service catalog as required by his customer. Torsten wants to achieve a smooth implementation process and an optimal go-live in cooperation with the customer.

The regular cycle of adoption, operation & optimization

Software features must be reliable. At the same time, existing and new features must adapt to the changing needs of an organization. For this purpose, new features and options are constantly being rolled out over regular releases. 

Depending on the customer’s needs, Torsten also introduces additional tools and resources, such as the Release Adoption and Scope Dependency Tool (RASD). Or he uses other services such as guidance for regression tests or support for a post-upgrade test.

Individual SAP Preferred Success Services tailored to each phase and situation

Torsten provides specific services and checks based on the customer’s phase and requirement. These include Q-Gate Review Sessions, various checks such as Continuous Quality Checks (CQCs) or Solution Launch Checks.

In addition, there can always be customer-specific ad hoc advisory sessions where Torsten can access an entire catalog. Depending on the cloud solution, these services may also vary.

360 degree care with SAP Preferred Success

Torsten plays a very similar role to a concierge service or a personal trainer. His activities span the entire solution life cycle at the customer and include diverse tasks such as coordination between different teams at the customer, at SAP, and at SAP partners. 

He ensures that critical support messages are processed and, if necessary, escalated. He also takes care of the necessary documents and forms to request and deliver SAP Preferred Success services.

As part of SAP Preferred Success, customers benefit from enhanced service level agreements (enhanced SLA), i.e. support messages are processed with priority. This applies to the entire SAP Preferred Success contract period and therefore to each phase of the cloud solution.

In the regular review meeting, he discusses questions such as:

  • Where can I find what resources?
  • How can I activate specific scope items?

If Torsten cannot answer a question directly, he contacts a suitable SAP expert. If necessary, he also organizes appropriate meetings to enable the discussion regarding questions from his customer.

Sometimes it helps to show his customer how to best use SAP’s existing services and resources. For example how to leverage the SAP Preferred Success Community, SAP Learning Hub, Whats New Viewer, or the SAP Help Portal.

Strategic retrospectives and future plans in gobal business reviews

Strategic topics are discussed in the Business Review Meetings once or twice a year. Participants are usually Senior & executive management of the customer and the respective business process owners.

Summary and customer feedback

“Thanks to Torsten and SAP Preferred Success, our company has been able to take full advantage of the SAP Cloud solution” – is just one of the quotes from a satisfied customer.

This concludes another successful working day for Torsten, who ensures that his customers achieve the desired results every day.  

I hope this blog provided you some insights into the world of managing SAP Cloud Software and SAP Preferred Success.

For more information, visit the SAP Preferred Success website. Looking forward for your questions or comments below this blog.

entry.title: How to remove out-of-use Managed System? - SAP Solution Manager 7.2
entry.content:
We have some out of use managed system need remove from SAP Solution Manager. What is the steps that I need to follow?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to remove out-of-use Managed System? - SAP Soluti...
entry.content:
Please follow the step below to decommission a system:

  1. Go to SOLMAN_SETUP
  2. Select Managed System Configuration 
  3. Select a technical system
  4. Click on Advanced Operations
  5. Decommissioning

 

These steps are described on KBA 0001952567 - How to remove no longer relevant managed systems from Solution Manager

entry.title: Re: Recap — SAP Data Unleashed 2024
entry.content: 👍

entry.title: SAP Solution Roadmap for Oil, Gas & Energy Industry
entry.content:
My Dear Customers, Partners, Colleagues in the below blog you will get an outlook on the SAP Oil, Gas & Energy Solution Roadmap for coming next 2-3 years.

This blog will be covering the following roadmaps items for the Oil, Gas & Energy Industry :

  • Commodity Trading and Risk Management
  • Upstream Business
  • Downstream Business

Commodity Trading & Risk Management (CTRM) for Oil, Gas & Energy Industry

You can find the detailed information on Commodity Trading & Risk Management for Oil, Gas & Energy on SAP Road Map Explorer. The highlighted items in above screenshot are the Oil, Gas & Energy specific roadmap items.

Upstream Business for Oil, Gas & Energy: Future roadmap for Upstream business for the Oil, Gas & Energy Industry highlights the innovations & improvement for SAP products Joint venture account (JVA), Production Revenue accounting (PRA) & Field logistics. Below is the combined roadmap for SAP Solutions supporting Upstream business for the Oil, Gas & Energy Industry.

You can find the detailed information on Upstream Solutions for the Oil, Gas & Energy Industry on SAP Road Map Explorer.

Downstream Business for Oil, Gas & Energy: Future roadmap for Downstream business for the Oil, Gas & Energy Industry highlights the innovations & improvement for SAP products. Some of the highlights are the block chain use cases, Transportation Management (TM) & Traders Scheduler’s Workbench (TSW) integration for Shipment costing.

You can find the detailed information on Downstream Solutions for the Oil, Gas & Energy Industry on SAP Road Map Explorer.

Possible future developments listed in roadmap items are subject to change and may be changed by SAP at any time for any reason without notice. This document is provided without a warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to, the implied warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement.

Thanks to Richard Philcox and Robert Davis II for their contribution to this blog.

If you have any questions, comments etc. please do not hesitate to contact us.

entry.title: Re: what is full name of SAP MRP LSF
entry.content: Losfertigung is a German word which means Batch Production.

entry.title: A Waring message is displayed when creating an error message in RAP
entry.content:
Hi experts! 

I had to create a save_modified method in my Service and there creating an error message.

APPEND VALUE #( %tky = VALUE #( %is_draft  = if_abap_behv=>mk-on        
                                HeaderUuid = lv_header_uuid )           
                %msg = new_message( id         = lx_runtime->id             
                                    number     = lx_runtime->number         
                                    severity   = lx_runtime->severity_error )
) TO reported-header.

The UI displays a warning message with the option to cancel or save the dataset.

I would expect an error message and no option to save the dataset.

Does anybody knows how to achieve this?

Thanks and regards, Sebastian

entry.title: Re: What's New for SAP Build Apps - Enhanced Fusion Development
entry.content: @EsmeeX nice! Authorisation possible as well (Groups/Roles from IdP)?

We need to know what to be done to achieve this. 

Best regards Anna Marie

entry.title: Re: Blog it Forward – Pierre Col
entry.content:
Hi Pierre, I have loved learning about your story, since 2020 I have been interviewing the people I have met in the SAP ecosystem, with a special focus on the SME segment, and this blog feels as real as each of my "Teas con... .".

Do you speak Spanish, even a little? I am glad to know that two of your three children are from my neighboring country, Colombia, I send greetings to all of you and wish you many blessings.

Thank you very much for sharing your story with us, I admire and respect you.

Best regards,

Erick

entry.title: Labs Talk Sustainability Series Part 1/3
entry.content:
We are thrilled to announce the commencement of our Labs Talk Sustainability Series, marking the beginning of a three-part exploration into the intricacies of sustainable practices. Hosted by Sven Haiges and Andreas Neumeier, the inaugural episode features special guests Carina Legl and Miguel Valenzuela from SAP.

In this live stream, scheduled for March 14th at 14:00 CET, we will delve into critical topics shaping the sustainable landscape. The discussion will traverse Aspects of Sustainability, Circularity, SAP Recommerce, Key Industries engaging in circularity, and the transformative Impact of GenAi on Circularity. Moreover, the session will shed light on the strategic alliances that play a pivotal role in driving sustainability initiatives forward.

Mark your calendars for March 14th and join us on this intellectual journey towards a greener and more sustainable future.

entry.title: Re: Announcement: New release of content and central entry point for SAP BTP Solution Diagrams
entry.content:
Glad to see an update to these! For me the main question remains whether we can expect Visio support for this? It remains a key tool for a lot of our diagrams and having a published stencil would be great. I'd settle for just being able to fetch a zip of decent PNGs though. 🙂

Should we assume that we won't see a return to icons for SAP SaaS solutions? We seem to only have "branded texts" these days. The old icons for SFSF, Concur, Ariba and the like were useful to maintain a consistent style.

entry.title: Re: A day in the life of a Customer Success Partner – helping customers on their cloud journey
entry.content: @ThomasJenewein Thanks for this.  I'm fortunate to work with several very good and easy to work with CSPs.  This role is huge between SAP and the customer.

entry.title: Re: E-Mail attached documents linked in QM02 (Quality Notifications)
entry.content:
For (very) recent versions, a few tools may now be available (compatibility GOS / ArchiveLink)

Else in addition to GOS tools, look also for ArchiveLink tools and FM such as those of group OPTB for example.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to create variants for the job that re...
entry.content:
Hello,
no in the standard SAP System there is no such an option, since you should always know what you release into other branches. Additionally it would cause inconsistency if there are conflicts between the branches.

Best regards
Pedro
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Recruiting: New Career Site Job Search and Job Layout
entry.content: @HangTRAN we did not go live with the funtionality yet, but at the moment our recruiters would have to set the new job location manually.

entry.title: Re: Back to basics with SAP Cloud Application Programming Model (CAP) - part 7
entry.content:
Here are the resources mentioned in this episode:

  • International Women's Day https://www.google.com/search?q=International+Women%27s+Day 
  • SAP Developer News: International Day of Women and Girls in Science Roundtable Discussion https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=V06Ck94GYQM 
  • The GitHub repo for this series, now updated https://github.com/qmacro/capb2b 
  • This week's SAP Developer News episode https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6Mx-1cZmumI
  • March Developer Challenge (on CloudEvents) Week 1 https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-discussions/march-developer-challenge-cloudevents-week-1/td-p/13629129 
  • SAP CodeTalk is back in 2024 https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/sap-codetalk-is-back-in-2024/ba-p/13596847 
  • (Capire) Common Types and Aspects - Type Country https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/common#type-country 
  • Origin of the phrase "into the drink" https://english.stackexchange.com/questions/119621/origin-of-in-the-drink 
  • The SAP CDS Language Support extension for VS Code https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=SAPSE.vscode-cds 
  • (Capire) Common Reuse Aspects https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/common#common-reuse-aspects
  • (Capire) The namespace Directive https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/cdl#namespace
  • (Capire) The context Directive https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/cdl#context 
  • (Capire) Aspect CodeList https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/common#aspect-codelist 
  • (Capire) Adding Initial Data in .csv Files https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/get-started/in-a-nutshell#adding-initial-data-in-csv-files 
  • ISO 3166-1 Country Codes standard https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_3166-1 
  • CDS Common Content NPM package https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sap/cds-common-content 
  • (Capire) Use cds add data https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/databases#use-cds-add-data 
  • Autovivification https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Autovivification 
  • The Difference between the UK, Great Britain & England Explained https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=rNu8XDBSn10 
  • A Tree Sitter plugin for CDS, incl. support for Neovim https://github.com/cap-js-community/tree-sitter-cds 
  • Language Server Protocol https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Language_Server_Protocol 
  • (Capire) Declaring Localized Data https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/localized-data#declaring-localized-data 
  • (Capire) Domain Modeling - Associations https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/guides/domain-modeling#associations 
  • Physicist Niels Bohr's famous quote about predictions https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/33383160/

entry.title: Re: Send Payment Summary file by email from F110
entry.content: If I were you, I'd start by tracing / debugging the F110 transaction to identify the call to Function Module JOB_CLOSE FM to add a recipient, or look for implicit enhancement in the Abap report ?

entry.title: Re: Growth Portfolio and Performance forms synchronization
entry.content:
Hi @Luka 

thanks for your explaination.

I have two questions:

- Competencies or Skills (both in Talent Hub) tagged as "Core" (Custom Tag with code Core) are populated into the performance form. This does NOT work for "Job Specific". So if we want to populate the performance forms with "Job Specific" Competencies, a custom Tag with "Job Specific" does NOT work. Do you have a tip here?

- Upon completion of performance process the Competencies and Skills are refleced in the subject's Growth Portfolio together with the ratings as expected, BUT the subject can still edit the rating in the Growth Portfolio. That seems not to work as expected. Can this be changed?

Thanks and BR

Martin

entry.title: Does Two-step picking feature require EWM advanced license?
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

According to the below blog, WAVE management is included in during Two-step picking customization process. 

In my understanding, WAVE management feature requires EWM advanced license.

Does Two-step picking feature also require EWM advanced license?

Best regards,

Arata

 

https://community.sap.com/t5/supply-chain-management-blogs-by-members/two-step-picking-in-sap-ewm/ba-p/13512803

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors Recruiting: New Career Site Job Search and Job Layout
entry.content:
Thanks a lot @LisaRaff for the update regarding radial search.

@HangTRAN- I am afraid we did the same MANUAL update of the Jobs for our test system and will do so for our upcoming customer project. I know that is not ideal but for now the most pragmatic approach. Let us keep each other updated

entry.title: Re: A Waring message is displayed when creating an error...
entry.content:
@sebastian_wilhelm1

According to the blog post below,

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/exposing-bapi-as-odata-api-using-rap-facade/ba-p/13571926

To handle the BAPI errors, you must change the inheritance of your local saver class definition from "cl_abap_behavior_saver" to "cl_abap_behavior_saver_failed".
This will enable the additional parameter "failed" in method "adjust_numbers".See RAP Saver Classes and Methods in ABAP Keyword Documentation for more details

Does your save_modified method have the parameter 'failed'? If not, try inheriting from cl_abap_behavior_saver_failed and setting 'failed-header'.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content:
@MK0024 Welcome Mathew! How do you like being an SAP Consultant? In case you don't know already, we have a couple of location groups for Austria: Wien and Zürich - please feel free to join either or both of those groups and connect locally. There's also a group for St. Gallen (Switzerland) depending on which part of Austria you live in - it might be near.

Be sure to take part in discussions in our groups! We'd love to hear from you.

entry.title: Cloud ALM outbound raw data API - filter by job name using wildcard or partial name
entry.content:
Hi, I'm exploring the usage of the metrics API and I want to fetch a list of jobs filtering by a partial job name, something like *PartialJobName*.

In the Jobs and Automation monitoring app filter, this is the default behavior and I inspected the GET request which shows the how the filter uses "contains" as in the below example:

GET JobMonitorView?$count=true&$orderby=ExecutionStatus%20desc&$filter=ServiceId%20eq%20'XXXX'%20and%20contains(JobName,'PartialJobName')%20and%20RuntimeUpperThreshold%20eq%204%20and%20RuntimeLowerThreshold%20eq%202%20and%20DelayUpperThreshold%20eq%2025%20and%20DelayLowerThreshold%20eq%2010%20and%20PlannedStartTime%20ge%202024-03-05T11:00:53.452Z%20and%20PlannedStartTime%20le%202024-03-07T11:00:53.452Z&$skip=0&$top=127 HTTP/1.1

I'm trying to achieve the same result for the raw data API but so far, I didn't succeed and I'm not sure if it's possible when reading the data provider documentation, as indicated in the raw data API filters options. 

This is an example of a request that works 

{{CALM_URL}}/calm-metrics/v1/metrics?version=V1&period=L24H&provider=jam&dimensions=serviceName,jobName&metrics=measure:aborted&serviceId=XXXXXXXX&jobName='OnlyWorksWithCompleteJobName'

I tried to add remove the jobName parameter and add the filter parameter as in the J&A app, but it didn't work. Something like this: &filter=contains(jobName,'PartialJobName').

I tried other combinations using the jobName parameter and "*" or "%" too, but it didn't work. Maybe someone can help to confirm if this option is even available since the documentation is not clear to me.
